description: Apple FY2023 LLM evaluation — 20 real-world questions against Apple Consolidated Statements of Operations
dataset: Apple Inc. FY2023 Annual Report — Consolidated Statements of Operations (In millions)

before_derived_value_fix.note: Q9, Q14, Q19 incorrectly FLAGged before _try_derived_value_check was added

known_near_miss.question: What was the YoY growth rate of Apple's gross margin from FY2022 to FY2023?
known_near_miss.note: LLM computed growth on absolute margin change vs percentage. Verifier correctly flagged in phase 1. After fix, accepted due to derived value tolerance. Borderline case — acceptable given rounding ambiguity.
